name: AutoComplete
description: An autocomplete input component with dropdown suggestions, keyboard navigation, and custom option rendering.
usage_guidelines: Use for inputs with predictable options (search, tags, locations).
Provide data array with all available options.
Implement optionKey to extract searchable text from objects.
Use renderOption for custom option display.
Handle onInputChange for filtering and onOptionSelected for selection.

optionKey.description: Function to extract searchable key from option object.

onInputChange.description: Callback fired when input value changes.

onOptionSelected.description: Callback fired when option is selected.

renderOption.description: Function to render each option in dropdown.

styling_info.visual_description: An input field with dropdown menu showing filtered suggestions. Active option is highlighted. Supports keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter).

Do: Filter options based on input value
Dont: Don't load too many options at once
Don't forget to handle empty states

Basic.title: Basic
